input.background: For each of the following comparisons, plot the data as back-to-back stemplots on a common stem. Then, compare group locations and spreads.
input.question: (a) Comparison A: Group 1: 90, 70, 50, 30, 10; Group 2: 70, 60, 50, 40. Plot the data as back-to-back stemplots and compare group locations and spreads.

output.answer:
Comparison A. Groups have the same central locations; group 1 has greater variability (spread).

Group 1 | | Group 2

$$
\begin{aligned}
0 \mid & 1 \mid \
\mid & 2 \mid \
0 \mid & 3 \mid 0 \
\mid & 4 \mid 0 \
0 \mid & 5 \mid 0 \
\mid & 6 \mid 0 \
0 \mid & 7 \mid 0 \
\mid & 8 \mid \
0 \mid & 9 \mid \
\times & 10
\end{aligned}
$$
